name: There's Chaos!
short_description: An action-packed game with roguelike progression. Pilot a combat drone in intense battles, fighting for resources and territory. Collect and fuse enemy weapons to upgrade your arsenal. Survive chaotic 30-minute runs, earn permanent upgrades, and dominate the battlefield!
detailed_description:
Control the Skies. Dominate the Battlefield. Upgrade to Survive.

In "There's Chaos!", you take the role of an elite drone pilot, deployed into hostile environments where resources are scarce and competition is fierce. Engage in high-speed aerial combat against rival drones, claim territory, and secure valuable upgrades to push your machine to its limits.

Features:

  • Fast-Paced Aerial Combat – Master precision piloting and outmaneuver your enemies in intense battles.

  • Roguelike Progression – Survive each wave to unlock powerful upgrades, customizing your drone to fit your playstyle.

  • Diverse Battlegrounds – Fight across dynamic environments, each presenting unique challenges and tactical opportunities.

Do you have what it takes to rise above the competition and rule the skies? The battlefield awaits.
